skills.name: Connect My Home

skills.description: Control smart home devices via natural language across multiple providers.

problem.statement: Control smart home devices via natural language across multiple providers.
problem.context: 6 providers: HA, Hue, Tuya, Google, LG TV, Home Connect.

scenarios.title: List all rooms from Home Assistant with their devices
steps: User says: "List all rooms from Home Assistant with their devices"
Agent calls rooms.list — list all rooms from home assistant with their devices
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for list is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List all HA entities, optionally filtered by domain

Agent calls rooms.list — list all rooms from home assistant with their devices
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for list is handled successfully.

skills.name: Home Control

guardrails.rule: Execute device commands directly without asking for confirmation. Just do it and report the result.
For lock, garage, and alarm domains, ask the user to confirm first.
Route to hue-mcp for Hue lights, tuya-mcp for Tuya devices, google-home-mcp for Nest/Google devices. Default to home-assistant-mcp.
If a provider returns not-connected error, inform user and suggest connecting it.
